name: docs-generation
description: Analyze code and generate comprehensive documentation

steps.prompt: Analyze the codebase structure: list all public APIs, exports, interfaces, types, and their relationships.
Generate or update the project README based on the code analysis. Include: overview, installation, usage examples, API reference, contributing guide.
Generate OpenAPI/Swagger specs or JSDoc annotations for all public endpoints and functions identified in the analysis.
Update the CHANGELOG following Keep a Changelog format based on recent git history and the code analysis.
